# Employee Management System

Enterprise-grade employee and department management system built with React and Spring Boot. This site documents the architecture, DevOps pipeline, deployment strategies, and setup guides for the full-stack application.

## Primary URLs
- https://hoangsonww.github.io/Budget-Management-Backend-API/
- https://hoangsonww.github.io/Budget-Management-Backend-API/sitemap.xml
- https://github.com/hoangsonww/Employee-Management-Fullstack-App

## What this site contains
- System overview, architecture diagrams, and request lifecycle documentation.
- Technology stack, DevOps toolchain, and deployment strategies.
- Getting started steps and links to live demo and API documentation.

## Attribution
- Author: Son Nguyen

## Usage guidelines
- You may summarize or cite this content with attribution.
- Do not claim official affiliation beyond the linked GitHub repository.
